1170899181.description: Specifies a particular block. Can be a string block name or a JSON object

states.description: Contains members named after each state, with boolean, integer, or string values.

1170899181.title: Block Specifier

amplitudes.description: Governs the attenuation of the first n octaves in the generated noise.

first_octave.description: Governs the general frequency characteristics of the generated noise. Lower value results in noise with lower frequency content.

name.description: The string used to initialize the noise. Has no impact on the qualitative aspects of the generated values.

block.description: The block to place if the noise sample satisfies the provided threshold/range

noise.description: The string identifier of the noise associated with this NoiseBlockSpecifier.

range.description: The range of sampled noise value associated with the provided Block.

threshold.description: The minimum sampled noise value associated with the provided Block.

description: Places continuous bands of blocks according to a noise distribution. This surface builder's processing has been implemented with sub-terrain height ranges in mind.

noise_block_specifiers.description: The noise block specifiers defining which ranges of noise are associated with which blocks. The ranges provided are valid on the interval [0, 1], and may overlap at their endpoints.

noise_descriptor.description: The Specification for the Noise used by the surface builder.

non_replaceable_blocks.description: A list of blocks that the surface builder is not allowed to replace. Leaving this list empty or unspecified will allow the replacement of any (non-air) block type.

items.description: Specifies a particular block. Can be a string block name or a JSON object

title: minecraft:noise_gradient
